name.description: The unique name of the component.

language.description: The primary programming language used for the component.

build.description: Configuration for building or compiling the component.

command.description: The executable command used to build the project.

args.description: A list of arguments passed to the build command.

command.description: The command or relative executable path to run the component.

args.description: A list of arguments passed to the run command.
